TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tjalja’avus, title = Tjalja’avus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjalja’avus} }

S.FORM: = Tjalja'avus = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Tjalja'avus. 341 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,122 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 1,092 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 30 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = tɟalɟa'a*us = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟalɟa'a*us. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjalja'avus = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Tjalja'avus. 341 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,122 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 1,092 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 30 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = tɟalɟa'a*us = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟalɟa'a*us. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, amis*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
